title: デビュー戦の後に・新緑の旨味

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital finishes strong in her important
debut race.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: The base... is the peak...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The base is the peak... The very first starting
gate... A distance not yet grasped... Entangled
legs...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Splashes of perspiration. Blind with adrenaline.
Quiet blankets the cheering. Only the scoreboard
is visible.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The emotional weight of it all is practically
unbearable! You get it, right? Can you feel it?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Sigh... And here I am, smooshed in among all these fresh young Umas as they run with fervor thrust into every step...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I underestimated how consuming the debut race
would be! We're all winners! All of us!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital appears thrilled to have run
alongside so many other rookie Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Still, today's race is just the very beginning, right?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
From this point forward, there'll be loads of
Umamusume waiting for me, right?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, it can't get any better than this! I've taken
my first step through the gates of paradise! I've
made it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And now, the simping begins! I'll simp on turf! I'll
simp on dirt! I'll simp until I can simp no more!
Let's head to the next one!
choice_data_list:
On that note, what do you say to a turf race
next?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Oh... right. Since today was dirt, next up
should be turf...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, Digitan! Pull it together! We gotta think
about this more seriously.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Mmm... Today was way too intense because it was
a debut race... Because of that, the others
practically shot across the track.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You know, I haven't quite had my fill of watching
Umas play in the dirt! I'd like a second helping of
it, please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we decide to gear up for the Hyacinth
Stakes at the beginning of next year.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Next year... That's kinda far off, though. Guess
that just gives me more time to run and prep...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Let's spend that time building karma as well. After
all, I'd like to get to know all the different types
of Umamusume more deeply. At arm's length, of
course.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having just begun our journey into the Twinkle
Series, we need to take every opportunity to
make new connections and increase our
knowledge as we prepare for the Hyacinth Stakes.
